commands.command: pip download repopact==1.4.0 --no-deps; diff vendored scripts/ and schemas/ against the 1.4.0 wheel
commands.summary: Vendored base equals 1.4.0 for repo_model, generate_dashboard, init_repo, new, frontmatter, check_frozen_surface, generate_spec, all schemas, and all templates. Missing from vendored: doctor.py, takeover.py, track_import.py, and the doctor/takeover CLI subcommands; adopt_repo.py/plan_import.py were older. Local extension: validate_repo.py and work-item.schema.json carry the preflight marker (24 lines / one property absent upstream).

commands.command: copy 1.4.0 doctor.py, takeover.py, track_import.py, adopt_repo.py, plan_import.py, repopact_cli.py into scripts/ (validate_repo.py and schemas left intact to preserve preflight)
commands.summary: Upgraded vendored tooling to 1.4.0 without clobbering the local preflight extension.
Upgraded 1.4.0 doctor/validate import and run cleanly against the repository.

commands.command: python inline negative/positive test for validate_repo.validate_orphan_work_dirs
commands.summary: A work/ subdir with a README but no work-item.json is flagged; the same dir with a manifest and an _audit companion is not. No false positives on tracked items or _audit dirs.
A source_of_truth pointer to a missing path is flagged; an existing path and a prose value are not.
Repository governance validation passed with the new orphan check active and work items 011 and 012 tracked.

environment.process_note: Vendored RepoPact upgraded from a pre-1.4.0 base (plus the local preflight extension) to 1.4.0, then extended with a hard orphan-work-dir validation error and a doctor warning for dead source_of_truth pointers. These extensions are candidates to upstream to ForgeWireLabs/repopact.
